rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §33.096, which governs cardiac assessments for student athletes. No overlap exists.
quote: Sec. 33.096. CARDIAC ASSESSMENTS OF HIGH SCHOOL PARTICIPANTS IN EXTRACURRICULAR ATHLETIC ACTIVITIES.
_note: Rule text concerns student athlete cardiac assessments; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict.
